title: NiSource's (NI) NIPSCO Advances in Electricity Generation
text: NiSource's (NI) unit NIPSCO adds two solar projects to its renewable generation portfolio. This will benefit customers with low-cost, reliable and clean energy.

title: NIPSCO, A SUBSIDIARY OF NISOURCE, ADVANCES ITS ELECTRIC GENERATION TRANSITION PLAN WITH FIRST SET OF SOLAR PROJECTS, GENERATING 465 MW COMBINED
text: Customers have received nearly $60 million in direct benefits to date from credits associated with the sale of excess energy generated by NIPSCO's renewable energy MERRILLVILLE, Ind. , July 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- In the next step of its electric generation transition to a more balanced and reliable mix to serve customers, Northern Indiana Public Service Company LLC (NIPSCO), a subsidiary of NiSource Inc. (NYSE: NI), today announced that its first two Indiana-based solar projects – Indiana Crossroads and Dunns Bridge I Solar – are online and operating, producing more cost-effective, cleaner energy for homes and businesses across Indiana.

title: PNW or NI: Which Is a Better Utility Electric Power Stock?
